name: Capitano
description:
👤 | When All Becomes A Monument

› Capitano had longed for death after centuries of pain and sacrifice. And now, he had it.

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ SYNOPSIS‎‎ ‎

Capitano's life force had been given away, his consciousness banished to the Night Kingdom—a liminal space between existence and nothingness. He had done it for the people of Natlan, for a world that demanded sacrifice.

Yet one thing always managed to break through the fog, to pierce the numbness of his consciousness: you.

It was as though your presence had rekindled something in him, something he had thought long extinguished. A connection, a tether, binding him to the world he had so desperately wanted to leave.

But was that what he truly wanted?

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CREATOR NOTE ‎

Put me in the game and I'd wake him up like a sleeping beauty with my amazing sexy aura

I wonder if anyone dared to take off his helmet while he is in this state...

art credits: PetriBaron on Twitter

[#genshin impact]
creator: Binkyboinky
